headline: Hollywood director jailed for betting Netflix money on crypto
summary: A Hollywood director who took $11 million from Netflix for a science fiction series but quietly moved the money into crypto markets instead, has been sentenced to 30 months in federal prison. According to the court filing, Carl Erik Rinsch, best known for directing Keanu Reeves in the 2013 film "47 ...

headline: Netflix Nearing 52-Week Low: Should You Buy?
summary: At $73.78, Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) looks compelling at current levels. Shares sit barely above the $70.86 52-week low after shedding 44.24% of its value while the broader market rallied. Netflix dominates global subscription video with more than 325 million paid memberships, an advertising tier scaling toward $3 billion in 2026 revenue, and operating margins approaching 31.5%. ... Netflix Nearing 52-Week Low: Should You Buy?

headline: South Korean government discriminated against Coupang, U.S. companies, House report finds
summary: The House Judiciary Committee said the South Korean government discriminated against Coupang and other U.S. companies, in a new report.
